profile_summary: Associate Data Scientist/ AI Engineer with hands-on internship experience in machine learning and NLP. Skilled in building predictive models, time series forecasting, and dashboards with data analysis using Python and modern AI tools.

projects.project_name: NLP-Based CCPI Predicting System Using Financial Articles
projects.project_details: Preprocessing articles and generating FinBERT embeddings of articles. Applied topic modeling to the BERTopic model with tuned UMAP and HDBSCAN. Constructed monthly topic-articles probabilities. Predict the CCPI value using microeconimic data.

projects.project_name: Automated Vehicle Market Data Pipeline using R
projects.project_details: Implemented modular scraping functions, dynamic user-agent rotation, HTTP retry logic, and multi-session parallelization to generate analysis-ready datasets for market analytics.
Developed LSTM and BiLSTM neural network models to classify tweets as positive or negative. Built a Random Forest model and achieved 86.68% accuracy.

projects.project_name: Predictive Modeling for Income Classification of Adults in the USA
projects.project_details: Developed an LSTM model to predict future values of multiple variables.

projects.project_name: Stock Price Prediction of Apple Inc.
Multivariate Data Analysis of Framingham Heart Study Dataset
projects.project_details: Applied principal component analysis, Linear discriminant analysis, Factor analysis, and K-Means clustering. Identified three principal components, three factors.

Reduced 10K+ high-cardinality categorical labels using LLaMA 8B. Applied CatBoost encoding and dimensionality reduction such as UMAP, PCA, Truncated SVD. Compared K-Means, Mini-Batch K-Means, and HDBSCAN cluster algorithms. Selected HDBSCAN based on the highest silhouette score and lowest deviation.

Automated report checking tasks. Converted PDF reports into OCR-processed raw text. Applied preprocessing techniques to noisy OCR raw text outputs. Extracted financial data values using LLaMA 8B. Created data frames. Generated structured Excel validation outputs for audit-ready reporting.
